item.title: Seed 1
item.description: digging in the dirt Here’s a link to Peter Gabriel: Digging in the Dirt because it’s a great song and these videos are still epic. I like the idea of the digital garden. It’s so easy to stall when I try to make a blog again and find myself wanting to craft the perfect posts every time. I imagine every negative reaction possible to every word and idea that I put down and it makes me hesitate until….

item.title: Hello Pages
item.description: It’s happening this time. This is my second go at getting hugo to wrok for me. I don’t mean that it didn’t work a few years back, only that it was so new as to be slightly frustrating to a new developer. This time things look slightly more familiar and the docs make more sense. When I write digitally it is almost exclusively in mark down Thank You Obsidian! testing out github pages before i go back to paying for a server and site that i may not keep up.
